short_description: Theranest EHR upgrade from v11.4 to v12.1
description: Major EHR version upgrade including new remote coaching integration and updated MT state documentation forms.

short_description: Deploy MCWC Chronic Pain Program iOS app to Bitterroot Chronic Pain Group iPads
description: Install MCWC Program dashboard iOS app on 3 Occupational Therapy department iPads for Bitterroot Chronic Pain Group. Frank Schultz coordinating with MCWC Chronic Pain Program Team.

short_description: Wi-Fi access point expansion - Occupational Therapy east wing rooms 102-106
description: Install two additional WAPs to improve wireless coverage in Occupational Therapy therapy rooms. Required for iPad-based MCWC Cohort.

short_description: New iMac imaging for Occupational Therapy room 106
description: Configure and image new iMac with Theranest, Microsoft 365, and MCWC Chronic Pain Program handouts for Occupational Therapy room 106.

short_description: Emergency badge access firmware patch
description: Apply vendor patch to Honeywell badge participant firmware after intermittent east wing failures. Requires brief access system downtime.

short_description: REDCap pilot integration go-live - BRC to MCWC Chronic Pain Program
description: Enable REDCap data pipeline from Bitterroot Chronic Pain Group project to MCWC Chronic Pain Program analytics platform. Frank Schultz and IT approval required.

short_description: Theranest custom template restoration after v12.1 upgrade
description: Restore corrupted goal measure and NRS custom template fields following the v12.1 upgrade. Coordinated with Theranest vendor support.

short_description: Microsoft 365 tenant migration for Occupational Therapy department mailboxes
description: Migrate Occupational Therapy department mailboxes to consolidated M365 tenant. Affects Outlook calendar sync for 6 staff.

short_description: JAMAR dynamometer calibration software allowlist exception
description: Add endpoint security policy exception to permit JAMAR calibration software install on Occupational Therapy workstations.

short_description: Zoom Health remote coaching person upgrade - therapy rooms
description: Roll out updated Zoom Health person across remote coaching rooms 108-110 to resolve one-way audio defect.

short_description: Shared drive permission restructure - Occupational Therapy template folder
description: Restructure shared drive ACLs to grant fieldwork students scoped read access to Occupational Therapy template library.

short_description: REDCap export job rate-limit tuning for pilot pipeline
description: Adjust REDCap batch export chunk size and retry backoff to prevent timeouts on datasets above 150 records.

short_description: ADP timeclock kiosk firmware update
description: Apply ADP timeclock kiosk firmware update to resolve dropped hourly entries. Brief downtime outside business hours.

short_description: Conference room 201 HDMI/AV switcher replacement
description: Replace failing HDMI switcher in room 201 to restore laptop projection for weekly team meetings.

short_description: VPN concentrator certificate renewal
description: Renew expiring VPN concentrator TLS certificate ahead of expiry. Required for remote fieldwork-site access.

short_description: Patterson Medical ordering portal SSO reconfiguration
description: Reconfigure SSO for the Patterson Medical supply-ordering portal after vendor endpoint URL change.

short_description: Network switch upgrade - Occupational Therapy east wing IDF closet
description: Replace aging access switch in east wing IDF to support added WAPs and reduce wireless latency in therapy rooms.

short_description: MCWC Chronic Pain Program handouts v4.5 rollout to Bitterroot Chronic Pain Group iPads
description: Deploy professional-dashboard v4.5 build to the three Bitterroot Chronic Pain Group iPads ahead of the July onboarding window.

short_description: Endpoint antivirus agent version upgrade - all workstations
description: Push antivirus agent upgrade fleet-wide during maintenance window. Requires staggered reboots across departments.

short_description: Backup retention policy update for professional documentation
description: Extend EHR backup retention to meet MT state professional-records requirements. Update backup job schedule and storage allocation.
